name: Book Utilization Report
query:
SELECT
  b.name AS `Book:Link/Book:160`,
  b.title AS `Title:Data:240`,
  b.author AS `Author:Data:160`,
  b.book_category AS `Category:Link/Book Category:140`,
  b.total_copies AS `Total Copies:Int:110`,
  b.available_copies AS `Available:Int:100`,
  COUNT(bi.name) AS `Times Issued:Int:120`
FROM `tabBook` b
LEFT JOIN `tabBook Issue` bi
  ON bi.book = b.name AND bi.docstatus = 1
GROUP BY b.name
ORDER BY `Times Issued` DESC
